title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
